sources.name: AnimeAV1 · TioAnime · AnimeFLV
sources.description: Daily-updated catalog scraped directly from AnimeAV1, TioAnime, and AnimeFLV. Includes anime metadata, episode lists, and video/embed URLs. Updated automatically via GitHub Actions every day at 06:00 UTC. Jikan is optional enrichment only. The last valid catalog is always kept as a fallback so the source never goes empty.

sources.name: Consumet KickAssAnime (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: KickAssAnime through Consumet. Use a public CONSUMET_API URL for Vercel/online mode; local http://localhost:3000 is only for your PC. Returns HLS/M3U8 sources and subtitle tracks when the selected server provides them.

sources.name: AniPub
sources.description: Online AniPub catalog addon loaded from all AniPub catalog pages with /api/info/:id gap filling. Direct mp4/m3u8 links use the main player; iframe links play inside AnimeTV with the embedded player.

sources.name: Anime1v (Japanese + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: Anime1v-compatible proxy for Japanese audio with Spanish subtitles when available. Use a public ANIME1V_API URL for Vercel/online mode, or http://localhost:3001 for local PC mode. Providers: AnimeAV1, TioAnime, MonosChinos, AnimeFLV, JKAnime.

sources.name: JIMOV TioAnime (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: JIMOV open-source TioAnime connector. Uses Japanese audio with Spanish subtitles when available. Direct file_url plays in the main player; embed servers stay in the embedded player.

sources.name: RapidAPI Anime Streaming (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: RapidAPI Anime Streaming source for direct HLS/M3U8 streams. AnimeTV prefers Japanese audio and Spanish subtitles; if only English subtitle files are returned, the player can use Spanish translation mode.
